title: ficus lilliputiana f. lilliputiana
intro: Ficus lilliputiana f. lilliputiana, also known as Ficus pumila var. lilliputiana or the dwarf creeping fig, is a compact, shrub-like variety of the Ficus pumila species. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to exhibit antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Ficus lilliputiana f. lilliputiana include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit hepatoprotective effects. Herbal preparations of Ficus lilliputiana f. lilliputiana are often used in traditional medicine, and it can be consumed as a tea or taken as a capsule, but more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
